title: Korak 16

challengeFiles.name: script

solutions.name: script

tests.text: You should log the message "It was fun learning about the different Math methods with you!" to the console.

description:
Za poslednji korak radionice, logovaćete poruku "It was fun learning about the different Math methods with you!" u konzolu.

I sa tom poslednjom promenom, završili ste radionicu MathBot!
